case_title: WANG CHAN U VS. TAO T. FAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-10-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY SERVE THE DEFENDANT WHO IS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER HIS WIFE IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR WITH INTERPRETERS. PLAINTIFF GIVEN INFORMATION FOR ACCESS BY THE MEDIATOR. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-14-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES RECEIPT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IN OPEN COURT. TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE NO. 824932
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,739.00 FILED BY CHAN U, WANG AS TO DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN U, WANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T. PLAINTIFF IS NOT A LICENSED CONTRACTOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY CHAN U, WANG FAN, TAO T.
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO TAO T. FAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
